summary: This is a comprehensive evidence packet for the runx skill SBOM maker. It contains the dogfood receipt data demonstrating the skill running successfully, along with observations covering all required metadata such as PR URLs, commit hashes, harness statuses, and verification verdicts.

dogfood.command: runx skill umbtest03/sbom-maker@sha-b0be55e0ee89 --registry https://api.runx.ai --json --input lockfile_type=npm-shrinkwrap --input lockfile='{"name": "mock-app", "version": "1.0.0", "lockfileVersion": 2, "requires": true, "packages": {"": {"name": "mock-app", "version": "1.0.0"}, "node_modules/lodash": {"version": "4.17.21", "resolved": "https://registry.npmjs.org/lodash/-/lodash-4.17.21.tgz", "integrity": "sha512-v2kDEe57lecTulaDIuNTPy3Ry4gLGJ6Z1O3vE1krgXZNrsQ+LFTGHVxVjcXPs17LhbZVGedAJv8XZ1tvj5FvSg=="}}}'

observations.value: A new user installs the skill with `runx add umbtest03/sbom-maker@sha-b0be55e0ee89 --registry https://api.runx.ai`. They run the skill locally by passing the lockfile_type and lockfile via the --input flags, and verify it by running `runx verify --receipt dogfood_receipt.json` on the output JSON.
